item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Dark Knight's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned dark knight─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level dark knight to 60 and complete all job quests up through “Absolution.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
